pre-generation.description: Validate prompt and references before Venice API call
checks: character descriptions present for all characters in shot
reference images loaded for locked characters
prompt length within Venice API limits
save image to disk with metadata

pre-assembly.description: Validate all panels before HTML assembly
checks: all planned shots have generated images
HTML file is valid and complete
all images embedded as data URIs

post-render-cut-qa.description: Run the cut-qa agent after any video assembly / edit render so regressions are caught before delivery
post-render-cut-qa.trigger: after src/mini-drama/assembler.ts OR src/editing/render.ts writes final.mp4 / final-edit.mp4
checks: visual-jump at every cut boundary (frame hash diff)
audio-pop at cut boundaries outside the fade window
max 3 fix iterations before surfacing to user
